title: Refunds offset spend and cash withdrawals are spend by default
description: Assume an explicitly linked refund or reversal uses its entire active credit magnitude, is on the same account and currency as one original outflow, has opposite sign, and uses its own Effective Date. Cumulative active refunds cannot exceed the original. It offsets the original transaction's current spend category and current spend pool; unlinked credits remain ordinary transactions and cash withdrawals remain External Spend unless linked to another tracked account. Validate representative examples in OQ-LEDGER-5.
